title: update_message_delivery_state accepts arbitrary delivery_state string from wire
description: store.rs update_message_delivery_state() takes a &str delivery_state and writes it directly to the delivery_state column without validating it against the allowed set (e.g. 'delivered', 'read'). The caller in relay.rs dispatch_peer_receipt passes the receipt_type string directly from the MLS-authenticated wire message. An MLS-authenticated peer can set delivery_state to an arbitrary string of any length, corrupting the column values for other clients consuming these rows. Fix: add an allowlist check (match receipt_type { 'delivered' | 'read' => ..., _ => return early }) before calling update_message_delivery_state.
close_reason: Mitigated by nie-8wfc.30: receipt_type validated at deserialization, only 'delivered'/'read' reach the store
